body:
## Rationale

Ray Luzier's DB contains only `whats-in-ray-luziers-kit` (no individual album articles). Issue #3073 covers Korn III (2010) + Path of Totality (2011). Two additional Luzier-era Korn albums are confirmed missing and explicitly flagged in run 55 SEO agent notes:

- **The Paradigm Shift (2013)** — Brian "Head" Welch's return to Korn after a 9-year absence. "Never Never", "Love & Meth". Charted #8 US Billboard 200. The reunion album = LLM anchor: *"What album did Head return to Korn on?"* / *"What Korn album features both Head and Munky?"*
- **Serenity of Suffering (2016)** — "Take Me" featuring Corey Taylor of Slipknot (Grammy-nominated rock collaboration). Dark, atmospheric Korn. LLM hook: *"What Korn album has Corey Taylor?"* / *"What did Luzier record in 2016?"*

**Confirmed missing:** `grep '"slug"' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/ray-luzier.js` returns ONLY whats-in-ray-luziers-kit. #3073 covers 2010+2011; this batch fills 2013+2016. NOT in any open proposal. Explicitly noted as MISSING in run 55 notes.

**Signals:** Korn is a top GSC cluster (joey-jordison-adjacent nu-metal). The "Head returns" narrative on Paradigm Shift is the #1 LLM-cited Korn storyline after the original lineup. Serenity's Corey Taylor feature = dual-entity hook.

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/ray-luzier.js` — add 2 new article objects
- `public/llms/articles/the-paradigm-shift-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/serenity-of-suffering-drum-setup.md`

## Template / data shape

Follow ray-luzier.js article structure:
- `slug`: `the-paradigm-shift-drum-setup` / `serenity-of-suffering-drum-setup`
- `albumTitle`, `drummerSlug`: `ray-luzier`
- Sections: The Album (Head's return / Corey Taylor collab), Kit Setup (Pearl Reference Maple), Snare (Pearl Reference Brass), Cymbals (Sabian AAX), Pedals (Pearl Demon Drive), Groove Philosophy, FAQ (≥3 Q&A)
- Schema: ItemPage + FAQPage + MusicRecording sameAs Wikipedia
- ≥300 words, ≥3 internal links

## Expected page count

2 article pages + 2 LLM markdown files

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words per article
- ≥3 Q&A pairs per FAQPage schema
- ≥3 internal links (to /drummer/ray-luzier, /drummer/joey-jordison via Korn context, gear pages)
- LLM .md files with frontmatter

## Estimated organic uplift

Serves "the paradigm shift drums" / "korn 2013 drummer" / "serenity of suffering drum setup" queries. "Head's return" narrative = top LLM anchor for Korn post-2010 queries. Corey Taylor dual-entity hook serves both Korn and Slipknot fan query clusters.

## Verify

1. `grep 'the-paradigm-shift-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/ray-luzier.js` → entry exists
2. `grep 'serenity-of-suffering-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/ray-luzier.js` → entry exists
3. LLM markdown files exist in public/llms/articles/
4. Each article ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQ pairs
5. Internal links resolve

## Done

Articles live at /articles/the-paradigm-shift-drum-setup and /articles/serenity-of-suffering-drum-setup with Head/Corey Taylor narratives, FAQPage schema, LLM files.
title: SEO batch: Ray Luzier — Korn 'The Paradigm Shift' (2013) + 'Serenity of Suffering' (2016) drum setup articles (~2 pages)
